why: §2.3: not_now is transient BY DEFINITION — retry_after_ms is REQUIRED. A hint-less transient refusal strands the producer.
§2.3: term is FORBIDDEN for admission refusals — rate exhaustion defers, never kills; a rate limit terminating work converts backpressure into data loss.
§2.4: a mirror kind that contradicts the co-carried token is MALFORMED — the receiver routes on the token and discards the object's cause. The seam rule the RFC-0007 boundary chartered here.
§3.3 (RFC-0006 D15 carve): out-of-charset segments REJECT — lowercasing would merge 'Acme' and 'acme' onto one KV key, merging their counters.
COLLISION CASE: coercing _ to - would merge amt_surface and amt-surface onto one key — one principal exhausts the other's budget or rides its headroom. Reject, never normalize.
§3.3: tiers 3-4 are RESERVED (phases 2+) and MUST NOT be repurposed before their phase ships.
